description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a unit_tests job in the default test stage using the runner's default Docker image. In its before_script it runs apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq ninja-build python3-pip libpng-dev libcairo2-dev libx11-dev libgtest-dev valgrind, then installs Meson with pip3 install meson. The script creates a build directory, runs meson --buildtype=debug .. && ninja to build, then executes meson test followed by meson test --wrap=valgrind to run tests under Valgrind. No services, caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
